title: Lineara harness result row (v0)
description: One row appended to results/experiments.jsonl per scoring run. The file is append-only: rows are never edited or deleted.

run_id.description: UUID4 generated per scoring run. Unique across the entire result history.

hypothesis_path.description: Repo-relative path to the hypothesis YAML at the time of the run.

hypothesis_hash.description: sha256 over the canonicalized hypothesis (sha256:<hex>). Lets readers detect rows whose hypothesis source has been edited since the run.

harness_version.description: Schema/coder generation tag. Bump when the metric or stream construction changes in a way that breaks bit-comparability.

metric.description: Name of the metric used to score this row.

score.description: Primary metric output. For compression_delta_v0: baseline_bits - mapped_bits (positive = compression improvement).

bits_per_sign_baseline.description: Baseline encoding bits divided by the number of tokens in the stream (including the inscription-boundary marker).

bits_per_sign_mapped.description: Mapped encoding bits divided by the number of tokens in the stream.

corpus_records_used.description: Number of corpus records that contributed at least one token to the stream (i.e. n_signs > 0 records after filtering).

corpus_snapshot.description: Identifier of the corpus snapshot used for the run. Format 'git:<sha>' for committed corpora; 'sha256:<hex>' for content-hashed snapshots.

ran_at.description: UTC RFC-3339 timestamp at the start of the run.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the scoring run in milliseconds.

notes.description: Operator note attached at submission time (e.g. via --note). Empty string when none provided.
